items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 9: To have / To understand. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I have I understand
• I have a cat I understand Spanish
• You have a dog You understand German
• I have a bicycle I understand only Chinese

items.text: I have a cat I understand Spanish

items.prompt: Eu tenho um gato. Eu entendo Espanhol.
options: I have a cat I understand Spanish 3.
I have a cat I understand Spanish
Spanish understand I cat a have I
You have a cat I understand Spanish

items.text: You have a dog You understand German

items.prompt: Você tem um cachorro. Você entende Alemão.
options: German understand You dog a have You
You have a dog You understand German 3.
I have a dog You understand German
You have a dog You understand German

items.answer: I have a bicycle I understand only Chinese
You have a table You understand French
